homepage.heroSubline: Legends Glass Inc. delivers expert window and door installation in Bakersfield. We handle tough jobs with precision and care, ensuring lasting quality.
aboutText: Legends Glass Inc. started with a simple goal: to provide Bakersfield with reliable and durable window and door solutions. We're a family-owned business built on years of experience tackling Kern County's unique climate challenges.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. Our team is committed to using quality materials and proven techniques, ensuring your windows and doors withstand the harsh Bakersfield sun and occasional dust storms.

We're proud to be a part of the Bakersfield community. We support local initiatives and strive to provide exceptional service to our neighbors. When you choose Legends Glass, you're choosing a company that cares.

services.name: Window Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert window installation services for Bakersfield homes and businesses.
services.description: Legends Glass Inc. provides professional window installation services tailored to Bakersfield's climate and housing styles. From older homes in Oleander-Sunset to newer developments in Seven Oaks, we've seen it all. We handle everything from initial measurements and window selection to precise installation and cleanup. Our team understands the importance of proper sealing to combat the summer heat and prevent dust infiltration. We work with a variety of window types, including vinyl, aluminum, and wood, ensuring we can find the perfect fit for your needs and budget. We take pride in our attention to detail and commitment to quality, ensuring your new windows provide lasting comfort and energy efficiency. We also offer window replacement services for all types of windows, including single-pane, double-pane, and energy-efficient windows. We can help you choose the right windows for your home or business, and we'll install them quickly and efficiently.

faq.question: What type of windows are best for Bakersfield's climate?
faq.answer: Energy-efficient windows with low-E coatings are ideal for reducing heat gain in the summer and heat loss in the winter. Vinyl windows are a popular choice due to their durability and affordability.

faq.question: How long does window installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the number of windows and the complexity of the project. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your window installation services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on our workmanship and materials, providing you with peace of mind.

services.name: Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish door installation services for your Bakersfield property.
services.description: Legends Glass Inc. specializes in professional door installation services for homes and businesses throughout Bakersfield. We understand that doors are more than just entryways; they're crucial for security, insulation, and curb appeal. Whether you're looking to upgrade your front door, install a new patio door, or replace an interior door, we've got you covered. We work with a wide range of door materials, including wood, fiberglass, and steel, ensuring we can match your style and budget. Our experienced installers pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper alignment, sealing, and weatherproofing to withstand Bakersfield's harsh conditions. We also handle the installation of door hardware, including locks, handles, and security systems, providing you with a complete and secure solution. From entry doors to sliding glass doors, Legends Glass Inc. ensures your door installation provides lasting beauty and functionality.
process: Step 3: Old Door Removal and Frame Preparation
Step 4: Professional Installation and Hardware Fitting

faq.question: What type of door is best for security?
faq.answer: Steel doors are generally the most secure option, offering superior resistance to forced entry. We can also install reinforced frames and high-security locks for added protection.

faq.question: How do I choose the right door style for my home?
faq.answer: We'll guide you through the selection process, considering your architectural style, personal preferences, and budget. We offer a wide range of door styles to complement any home.

faq.question: Do you install sliding glass doors?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in the installation of sliding glass doors, providing you with seamless access to your patio or backyard.

services.name: Window Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable window repair services to restore your Bakersfield windows.
services.description: Legends Glass Inc. offers comprehensive window repair services to address a variety of issues, from cracked glass to broken seals. We understand that damaged windows can compromise your home's energy efficiency, security, and appearance. Our skilled technicians are equipped to handle all types of window repairs, including glass replacement, frame repair, and hardware replacement. We use quality materials and proven techniques to restore your windows to their original condition, saving you the cost of a full replacement. Whether you have a broken window in your Oleander-Sunset home or a foggy window in your Seven Oaks office, we're here to help. We offer prompt and reliable service, ensuring your windows are repaired quickly and efficiently. We also offer emergency window repair services for urgent situations.

faq.question: How do I know if my window needs to be repaired or replaced?
faq.answer: If your window has cracked glass, a broken seal, or is difficult to open or close, it may need to be repaired. If the damage is extensive or the window is very old, replacement may be a better option.

faq.question: Can you repair foggy windows?
faq.answer: Yes, foggy windows are often caused by a broken seal, which allows moisture to enter between the panes of glass. We can replace the glass unit to restore clarity.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency window repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency window repair services for situations that require immediate attention, such as broken windows that pose a security risk.

services.name: Door Repair
services.shortDescription: Bakersfield's trusted door repair service, fixing any door type.
services.description: Legends Glass Inc. provides expert door repair services throughout Bakersfield, addressing issues from squeaky hinges to damaged frames. We understand that a malfunctioning door can be a major inconvenience and security concern. Our experienced technicians are equipped to handle all types of door repairs, including hinge replacement, lock repair, frame repair, and weather stripping replacement. We use quality materials and proven techniques to restore your doors to their proper function, ensuring smooth operation and enhanced security. Whether you have a sticking door in your Riviera/Westchester home or a damaged frame in your commercial building, we're here to help. We offer prompt and reliable service, minimizing disruption to your daily routine. We also offer emergency door repair services for urgent situations, such as broken locks or damaged frames.

faq.question: Why is my door sticking?
faq.answer: Sticking doors can be caused by a variety of factors, including humidity, warped frames, or loose hinges. We can diagnose the problem and provide the necessary repairs.

faq.question: Can you repair a door frame?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair damaged door frames, including rot, cracks, and impact damage. We use quality materials and techniques to restore the frame to its original strength and appearance.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency door repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency door repair services for situations that require immediate attention, such as broken locks or damaged frames that compromise security.

services.name: Patio Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your outdoor living with expert patio door installation in Bakersfield.
services.description: Legends Glass Inc. specializes in the installation of patio doors that seamlessly blend indoor and outdoor living spaces in Bakersfield homes. We understand the importance of a well-installed patio door for energy efficiency, security, and aesthetic appeal. We offer a wide variety of patio door styles, including sliding glass doors, French doors, and bi-fold doors, ensuring we can find the perfect fit for your needs and preferences. Our experienced installers pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper alignment, sealing, and weatherproofing to withstand Bakersfield's climate. We also handle the installation of door hardware, including locks, handles, and screens, providing you with a complete and functional solution. From expanding your living space to creating a seamless transition to your backyard oasis, Legends Glass Inc. ensures your patio door installation provides lasting beauty and functionality.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation and Door Selection
Step 3: Old Door Removal and Frame Preparation
Step 4: Professional Installation and Hardware Fitting

faq.question: What type of patio door is best for energy efficiency?
faq.answer: Sliding glass doors with low-E coatings and insulated frames are a popular choice for energy efficiency. French doors with insulated glass can also provide good energy performance.

faq.question: How do I choose the right patio door style for my home?
faq.answer: We'll guide you through the selection process, considering your architectural style, personal preferences, and budget. We offer a wide range of patio door styles to complement any home.

faq.question: Do you install pet doors in patio doors?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install pet doors in patio doors, providing your furry friends with easy access to the outdoors.

services.name: Commercial Window Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable window solutions for Bakersfield businesses.
services.description: Legends Glass Inc. provides comprehensive commercial window services for businesses throughout Bakersfield. We understand the importance of quality windows for energy efficiency, security, and aesthetics in a commercial setting. Our experienced team handles everything from window installation and repair to replacement and maintenance. We work with a variety of window types, including storefront windows, office windows, and industrial windows, ensuring we can meet the specific needs of your business. We offer prompt and reliable service, minimizing disruption to your operations. We also offer emergency window repair services for urgent situations, such as broken windows that pose a security risk. Whether you're looking to upgrade your windows for improved energy efficiency or repair damaged windows to maintain a professional appearance, Legends Glass Inc. is here to help.
process: Step 3: Old Window Removal and Frame Preparation

faq.question: What type of windows are best for commercial buildings?
faq.answer: Energy-efficient windows with low-E coatings and insulated frames are ideal for reducing energy costs in commercial buildings. Aluminum windows are a popular choice due to their durability and affordability.

faq.question: Do you offer window tinting services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer window tinting services to reduce glare and heat gain in commercial buildings.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency window repair services for businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency window repair services for businesses, ensuring that broken windows are quickly repaired to maintain security and prevent further damage.

reviews.name: Maria Rodriguez
reviews.text: Legends Glass installed new windows in my entire house in Oleander. The team was professional, efficient, and the windows look fantastic. They even cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: My front door was sticking badly. Legends Glass came out and fixed it quickly. The price was fair and the technician was knowledgeable. Great service!

reviews.name: Linda K.
reviews.text: We had Legends Glass install a new sliding glass door to our patio. It looks amazing and has really opened up our living space. The installation was seamless and the team was friendly and professional.

reviews.name: Robert Chen
reviews.text: Excellent service! I had a cracked window that needed to be replaced ASAP. Legends Glass responded quickly and had it fixed within a day. Very happy with their work.

reviews.name: Susan Miller
reviews.text: Legends Glass installed a new front door for us. The door itself is beautiful, and the installation was done well. There was a slight delay in scheduling, but overall, we're very satisfied.

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: Legends Glass handled a large window replacement project for our office building. They were efficient, professional, and the new windows have made a noticeable difference in energy efficiency. Highly recommend them for commercial projects.
